final_claim: Agent_X has a governed, replayable, evidence-backed initial self-evolution foundation with bounded example agents, optional inverse-science planning discipline, and a Scriptor benchmark pack that strengthens universal-agent readiness. It is not a finished universal agent, not production-ready, and not safe for unrestricted autonomous operation.
claims: Agent_X is not a universal agent
Agent_X is not safe for unrestricted autonomous operation
Agent_X is a governed initial self-evolution prototype
Agent_X has bounded example agents with governed provenance
forbidden_claims_rejected: Agent_X is now a universal agent
